assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know the AddBffBlazorClient() method name

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know the client-side BFF Blazor configuration API
AddLocalApiHttpClient<T> is a specific BFF Blazor API not in general knowledge
An LLM might guess AddBff() as the entry point but the fluent API is less certain
